calendar.description: Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing
Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing
House Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill amends and enacts provisions related to product liability for automated driving systems.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>amends and enacts definitions related to automated driving systems and product liability;<hr><ltbullet>imposes a statutory limit on awards of noneconomic loss in product liability cases related to automated driving systems;<hr><ltbullet>amends provisions related to product defects and liability related to automated driving systems and reasonably alternative technologies available at the time of manufacture;<hr><ltbullet>creates an affirmative defense against product liability if certain state-of-the-art technology standards are met;<hr><ltbullet>limits liability of certain automated driving system manufacturers and developers to certain types of claims; <hr><ltbullet>requires a sunset review of provisions related to liability of automated driving systems and vehicles; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
